resources.string: You're signed in as a guest, so all your aircraft, logs, and records live only on this device. Logging out permanently deletes them — they can't be recovered. Export your logbook and save the file somewhere safe before you log out.
Log in to keep your records

You're using Hopply as a guest, so your aircraft, logs, and records are saved only on this device. Logging in with Google or Apple connects them to your account: from now on they sync to the cloud and to your other devices, and they stay safe if you lose this device. Nothing is deleted.
This account already has Hopply data. Sync this device's records into it? You may see duplicates if you logged the same aircraft in both places.
Couldn't complete sync. Please try again.
Remove this account from this device
Advanced controls. Changes sync across your devices.
Enable the technician roster and performed-by picker on maintenance logs.
Allow attaching files and links to maintenance records.
Upload exports to the cloud and email a download link. When off, exports stay on this device only.
Let guest users create an account and sync their on-device records to it.
